title: Add score() method to all neighbors estimators
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin.score returns mean accuracy; RegressorMixin.score returns R^2. Add to:
- FittedKNeighborsClassifier (mean accuracy)
- FittedRadiusNeighborsClassifier (mean accuracy)
- FittedNearestCentroid (mean accuracy)
- FittedKNeighborsRegressor (R^2)
- FittedRadiusNeighborsRegressor (R^2)
